description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet featuring the iconic 'Space Invaders' branding. The cabinet is primarily constructed from wood with a bold red trim outlining its angular silhouette. The side panels are decorated with vibrant, retro-themed artwork depicting a space battle scene, including a large alien figure and a spaceship firing upwards. The front houses a control panel with a joystick and several colored buttons, positioned below a large, slightly recessed display screen. Above the screen, a marquee area displays the 'Space Invaders' logo in bright yellow letters on a dark background. The lower front section likely contains a coin slot and access panel, typical of arcade machines.
description: A classic upright 'Space Invaders' arcade cabinet with vivid side artwork, a red-trimmed frame, and a control panel featuring a joystick and buttons below a large display screen.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the control panel, joystick, buttons, screen, and detailed side artwork with the 'Space Invaders' logo and space battle imagery.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the control panel layout, screen, and the right side's colorful graphics and red trim.
description_view_2: Rear-left view focusing on the back panel, which is mostly plain black with ventilation grilles and a warning sticker, while the side artwork remains visible.
description_view_3: Rear-right view showing the back and right side, emphasizing the cabinet's angular shape, black rear surface, and the continuation of the side panel graphics.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, slightly curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen area.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and several colored buttons arranged in a row, set on a dark panel with colored accents.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Space Invaders' logo in bold yellow text on a dark background, with additional space-themed graphics matching the cabinet's retro aesthetic.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels display vibrant, retro artwork with a large alien figure, a spaceship, and the 'Space Invaders' logo in yellow, set against a blue background with red trim.
